c.d: Ability to send broadcast or mass messages to multiple contacts or groups, including SMS blasts and app-based messaging.
Maximum number of contacts/messages that can be broadcast or grouped in a single message or campaign.
Integration with other productivity or business platforms like Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, or CRM tools.
Ease of use and user-friendliness of the app interface for sending broadcast messages.
Availability of analytics or reporting tools to monitor message delivery, engagement, and campaign performance.
End-to-end encryption or secure communication protocols to protect message content and user data.
